optical pickup records and reproduces information such as video or audio data onto/from recording media, e.g., discs (or disks). A disc has a structure that an information-recorded surface is formed on a substrate. for example, the substrate can be made of plastic or glass. In order to read or write information from a high-density disc, the optical pickup must be able to precisely focus a laser beam on the information-recorded surf

With over 20 years of experience in residential construction projects we are committed to providing exceptional customer service with our expert team who will ensure your home is kept warm during winter months. Our range includes all types of plumbing from installing new hot water systems through repairing leaking pipes and drains, while roof repairs can include everything from minor leak fixes up to full reroof replacement. We also provide a 24/7 emergency service for any urgent issues that may arise at your home or business
